purpose: Regression seed for the 'pharmacy with delivery' prompt class. Stress-tests preset_classifier substring matcher (Flowapteka brand-style names), palette anchoring (must NOT come out indigo+violet), and section selection (pharmacies sell products — no SaaS-tier pricing).

input.prompt: Сделай сайт онлайн-аптеки Flowapteka с доставкой по Москве. Консультации фармацевтов, оформление рецептов онлайн, широкий ассортимент лекарств и БАДов.

notes: Genealogy: failure case /p/sait-apteki-53a12d (2026-05-26) — came out with #4f46e5 indigo + SaaS-tier pricing. Root causes documented in [[concepts/omniaai-generation-quality-regressions-2026-05-26]]. This golden exists to catch regressions to that state.
